records.ety: [F. ambulance, hpital ambulant, fr. L. ambulare to walk. See Amble.]

defs: A field hospital, so organized as to follow an army in its movements, and intended to succor the wounded as soon as possible. Often used adjectively; as, an ambulance wagon; ambulance stretcher; ambulance corps.
An ambulance wagon or cart for conveying the wounded from the field, or to a hospital.
